operations.description: Sets or merges cost-allocation and ownership tags on this Service Discovery Service (aws_service_discovery_service). In-place, takes effect immediately, and has no effect on the resource's data, configuration, endpoints, or access. Auto-generated tag operation (the comprehensive AWS tag surface). AWS tag keys are case-sensitive.
